summary: The implementation provides a functional YouTube-like video platform with core features including video upload, playback, comments, subscriptions, and recommendations. However, several requested features are missing or incomplete, and there is evidence of some unspecified functionality in user profile management.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create a video listing page displaying all uploaded videos with thumbnails, titles, view counts, and upload dates
missing_requirements.reason: No dedicated video listing page component or route was found. HomePage component was added but not included in the diff summary. VideoCard component exists but the listing page itself is missing from visible files.

missing_requirements.requirement: Build a video recommendation system showing suggested videos based on viewing history or popularity
missing_requirements.reason: RecommendedVideos component only sorts by view count (popularity) but does not implement viewing history tracking or personalized recommendations based on user activity. The acceptance criterion 'Recommendations update based on user activity' is not fulfilled.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create user profile pages showing uploaded videos and subscriber count
missing_requirements.reason: ProfilePage component was added but not included in the diff summary. Cannot verify if it displays uploaded videos and subscriber count as required.

missing_requirements.requirement: Render generated platform branding images and icons as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of generated logo.dim_256x256.png or favicon.dim_64x64.png files being created or referenced. The Layout component uses hardcoded SVG icons instead of the requested generated images from the specified directory.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile management system with name and channel description fields
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention user profile creation, profile setup modals, or channel descriptions. These features (UserProfile type, ProfileSetupModal, saveCallerUserProfile, getUserProfile) were implemented without being requested.
The BuildRequest does not request the ability to filter videos by channel or uploader. The getChannelVideos function and useGetChannelVideos hook were implemented without being specified.
